case_title: OPERATING ENGINEERS LOCAL UNION NO.3 et al VS. MARINSHIP CONSTRUCTION SERVICES INC., et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-28-2006 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER OPERATING ENGINEERS LOCAL UNION NO.3, OPERATING ENGINEERS TRUST FUNDS, BOARD OF TRUSTEES FOR THE OPERATING ENGINEERS, BOARD OF TRUSTEES FOR THE PENSIONED OPERATING, BOARD OF TRUSTEES FOR THE PENSION TRUST FUND; PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD.
